Phase-57.NAME: Premium User Cabinet
Phase-57.objective: Turn the personal cabinet into a compact premium command center for VPN, MTProto, subscription, devices, referrals, and settings.
Phase-57.non-goals: Backend API shape changes, VPN/MTProto runtime changes, deploy/install changes, tariff catalog mutations.

steps.step-1: Map primary first-screen user tasks: VPN config, subscription countdown, MTProto proxy, device state.
steps.step-2: Retune dashboard into compact premium Matrix command surface.
steps.step-3: Retune config page for QR, download, copy, raw config, and device selection without wide layouts.
steps.step-4: Retune subscription page for tariff state, countdown, calendar, and renewal CTA.
steps.step-5: Retune referrals and settings into compact secondary surfaces.
steps.step-6: Preserve MTProto owner-only tg:// and https://t.me actions and redaction guards.
steps.step-7: Verify one-or-two-tap reachability for primary phone workflows.
steps.step-8: Create Phase-57 smoke for user routes, primary actions, no-overlap, no-overflow, and redaction.
steps.step-9: Run frontend build, smoke, screenshots, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, and protected surface guard.

Phase-57.acceptance: User cabinet becomes premium and more compact while preserving every core workflow.
